titles.en: Faithfulness versus faithlessness in divine and human relations

text: ٢٥٩. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): الْوَفَاءُ لِأَهْلِ الْغَدْرِ غَدْرٌ عِنْدَ اللهِ، وَالْغَدْرُ بَأَهْلِ الْغَدْرِ وَفَاءٌ عِنْدَ اللهِ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 259. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: Faithfulness with faithless people is faithlessness with Allāh, while faithlessness with faithless people is faithfulness with Allāh.
